frame:
💬 Chat with your Amplitude data
We’ll wire the Amplitude MCP into Claude Code, Cursor, Claude Desktop, and other AI tools you have
installed. You can then ask questions, build charts, and check metrics from chat (e.g. “show me
yesterday’s signups”).

⠋ Looking for supported AI tools…

  → Run the wizard again with --debug for more detail

  Press any key to exit
